mapper.insert: insert into user (user_id, user_name, user_password, email_id, email_domain) values (#{userId}, #{userName}, #{userPwd}, #{emailId}, #{emailDomain})
mapper.select: select user_id from user where user_name=#{userName} and email_id = #{emailId} and email_domain = #{emailDomain}
select user_password from user where user_id=#{userId} and email_id = #{emailId} and email_domain = #{emailDomain}
select user_id, user_name, email_id, email_domain, user_password from user where user_id=#{userId}
select user_name, user_id, user_password, email_id, email_domain, manager from user
mapper.update: update user set manager = #{manager} where user_id = #{userId}
